text:
is a teacher at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Gustav has combed brown hair and dark brown eyes. He wears a dark gray suit with a brown neck tie.

Story

Gustav attends the first years' entrance ceremony.

After Titans appear and steal all of the festival food stands, Gustav later attends a meeting with other teachers to discuss the situation subsequent to Eren Jaeger's successful attempt against the principal.
